title: PINS Stock Earnings: Pinterest Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Pinterest reported first quarter results that topped Street estimates on both the top and bottom lines on April 30, 2024. Adjusted earnings of $0.20 per share beat the $0.14 estimate. Revenue of $740.0 million was better than the $700.3 million estimate. Pinterest reported having 518 million monthly active users compared to an estimated 503.75 million. Average revenue per user of $1.46 topped estimates of $1.39. The San Francisco-based Internet content provider reported revenue growth year over year, driven by strong user growth across all regions. Adjusted EBITDA was $112.9 million in first-quarter 2024, up from the prior-year quarter's tally of $27 million. The company exceeded analyst expectations for both earnings per share and revenue growth.
